name: xtreme1
description: Xtreme1 is an all-in-one data labeling and annotation platform for multimodal data training and supports 3D LiDAR point cloud, image, and LLM.
summaryZh: Xtreme1 is an all-in-one data labeling and annotation platform for multimodal data training and supports 3D LiDAR point cloud, image, and LLM. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。
